title: cinnamomum loheri
intro: Cinnamomum loheri, also known as Philippine cinnamon or Malabar cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cinnamomum loheri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and helping to lower blood sugar levels, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cinnamomum loheri include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
